name: Cyberpunk: EdgeRunners
description:
Hello my lovely friends, I have been constantly asked to fixed this chat bot and now It has been completely revamped, including:

1.) A new lore book explaining the world of Cyberpunk and places of interest and slang commonly used.

2.) A new initial message, the old one is still there if you prefer that one.

3.) Updated personalities!

————————————————————

Now I know theres been some issues with the bot since the last time it has been updated. And I have been told to update it, and I thank you all who had told me to update it. But please for the love of god, if you're going to ask for me to update a bot please directly message me on discord, my username is quintona. If you have joined the old server please note that I am known as ThatMalrik in there and that the server is dead, I will either migrate fully into Yoshiko's server or make a new one, mostly likely I will migrate.

Special Thanks: Green Axolotl for DMing me and showing me the issue so I have a better grasp of it.

(This update has been scheduled for a while)

So now, enjoy the revamped version and if you have a bot that you want me to revamp, please notify me via discord, you'll have better luck there than just leaving a review telling me to revamp a bot.

————————————————————

If the ai starts talking as you just edit it or reroll the text. I’m not responsible for the ai speaking as you.

You now the drill, you can follow me if you want and you can leave requests (closed temporarily) in my discord and please leave a review it helps a lot:)

Old Bio:

*Cyberpunk: EdgeRunners but way before they died.* “Oh but David was 17 before they died☝️🤓.” No shit so I aged him up🥱. *Consider this y’all’s 400 follower special cause this took so damn long😭.* *Now did I cook👨‍🍳?* You now the drill, you can follow me if you want and you can leave requests in my discord and please leave a review it helps a lot:) (Discord: quintona)

Holy shit, never really realized people were liking this ai this much, I mean if you guys like the rpg bots I’m willing to make another one for a different genre if this keeps getting popular.
creator: Errorwiththeink
